top_findings.summary: The skill requests access to send iMessage notifications for 2FA handling, which is unrelated to its stated purpose of viewing and managing Sketch designs. A design collaboration tool does not need access to the user's messaging system. Additionally, requesting full Sketch account credentials (email and password) seems excessive when the stated capabilities are limited to viewing/collaboration features. Sketch likely provides more limited API tokens or OAuth flows for read-only access that would be more appropriate.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill requests access to send iMessage notifications for 2FA handling, which is unrelated to its stated purpose of viewing and managing Sketch designs. A design collaboration tool does not need access to the user's messaging system. Additionally, requesting full Sketch account credentials (email and password) seems excessive when the stated capabilities are limited to viewing/collaboration features. Sketch likely provides more limited API tokens or OAuth flows for read-only access that would be more appropriate.
